rag_rules: Use `assign` only for output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when using visible feature names and concrete bounds
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks are scoped to their owning component declaration
Only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
